description_long: This is a modern, asymmetrical shelving unit with a striking geometric design. The structure features three open, box-like compartments stacked vertically on one side, constructed from a dark, likely wood or laminate material. Extending horizontally from the middle of the shelving column is a wide, flat surface in a contrasting light gray color, which could serve as a desk or display area. The opposite end of the horizontal surface is supported by a single, angled leg, giving the piece a dynamic, cantilevered appearance. The open cubbies provide ample space for storing or displaying books, decor, or other items, while the large flat surface offers additional utility. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or modern homes.
description: A modern, asymmetrical shelving unit with three open black cubbies and a wide, light gray horizontal surface supported by an angled leg. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: The view shows the narrow side of the shelving unit, highlighting the vertical stack of three black cubbies and the thickness of the horizontal surface.
description_view_1: This view displays the full length of the horizontal surface, the three stacked cubbies on the left, and the angled supporting leg on the right.
description_view_2: From above, the top surfaces of the cubbies and the wide horizontal surface are visible, emphasizing the depth and layout of the unit.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1 but from the opposite side, showing the open cubbies on the right and the angled leg on the left.
